use_cases: Custom cursor replacement for websites to create pixel art aesthetics
Visual feedback for user mouse position tracking
Theme-aware cursor styling that adapts to dark/light modes
Smooth cursor trail effect with fade overlay
ai_summary: A pixelated cursor effect rendered on a 32x32 canvas that smoothly follows the mouse position using linear interpolation. Features theme-aware coloring with a fade trail overlay effect, creating a minimalist visual enhancement suitable for decorative cursor customization in web applications.
